# 豆包AI产品全功能使用指南

本指南为豆包AI官方完整版产品使用手册，全程围绕产品核心功能、操作逻辑、实操方法、规范避坑四大核心维度展开，无冗余入门铺垫、无进阶层级划分，直接全面、系统、细致地介绍豆包AI全品类功能、使用方法、适用场景与操作细节，立足2026年3月最新版本迭代内容，覆盖所有端入口、全场景用法、高频问题解决方案，全文内容详实、条理清晰，适合所有用户直接查阅使用，快速吃透豆包AI的全部产品能力，实现高效、精准、合规使用。

豆包AI是由字节跳动公司自主研发的通用型人工智能助手，依托先进的大语言模型技术与多模态算法能力，打造集智能对话、知识解答、内容创作、文件处理、多模态交互、个性化定制、生活服务于一体的全能AI工具，面向学生群体、职场办公人士、内容创作者、自由职业者、中老年用户、科研学习者等全人群，主打免费易用、响应快速、多端同步、安全合规、功能全面的核心产品特性，无需复杂操作门槛，无需高额付费成本，即可满足日常工作、学习、生活、创作中的各类AI辅助需求，成为全民通用的智能生产力工具。

相较于同类AI产品，豆包AI始终坚持普惠化产品定位，基础核心功能永久免费开放，高阶特色功能无强制付费门槛，同时持续优化模型能力，迭代新增实用功能模块，适配不同用户的个性化需求，兼顾普通用户的简易操作需求与专业用户的深度使用需求，是目前市面上适配性最强、受众最广、操作最便捷的国产AI助手之一。
structure.summary: This partial document covers the following main points: First, it introduces the positioning and characteristics of the "Doubao AI Full Function User Guide": it is the official full product manual based on the latest iteration version of Doubao AI as of March 2026, developed around four core dimensions of product core functions, operation logic, practical operation methods, and compliance and pit avoidance, covers all terminal entrances, full-scenario usage and solutions to high-frequency problems, has no redundant introductory content or tiered division, and is suitable for all users to consult to fully master Doubao AI's product capabilities and achieve efficient, accurate and compliant use. Second, it explains the basic attributes of Doubao AI: it is a general-purpose artificial intelligence assistant independently developed by ByteDance, relying on advanced large language model technology and multi-modal algorithm capabilities, integrates multiple capabilities including intelligent dialogue, knowledge answering, content creation, file processing, multi-modal interaction, personalized customization and life services, targets all user groups such as students, office workers, content creators, freelancers, middle-aged and elderly users, and scientific research learners, has core features of free and easy to use, fast response, multi-terminal synchronization, safe and compliant, and comprehensive functions, can meet various AI auxiliary needs in daily work, study, life and creation as a universal intelligent productivity tool. Third, it introduces the competitive advantages of Doubao AI compared with similar AI products: it adheres to the inclusive product positioning, permanently opens basic core functions for free, has no mandatory payment threshold for high-level featured functions, continuously optimizes model capabilities and iterates new practical function modules to adapt to users' personalized needs, meets both ordinary users' simple operation needs and professional users' in-depth use needs, and is one of the domestic AI assistants with the strongest adaptability, the widest audience and the most convenient operation in the current market.

nodes.title: 一、产品核心定位与核心价值
nodes.text:
## 一、产品核心定位与核心价值

豆包AI的核心产品定位为**全民普惠型全能AI助手**，区别于垂直领域专业AI工具，不局限于单一使用场景，而是覆盖生活、学习、工作、创作、娱乐、服务等全维度需求，致力于用AI技术简化日常事务、提升效率、解答疑惑、辅助创作，让人工智能技术真正落地到普通人的日常使用场景中，打破AI使用的技术门槛与成本门槛，实现人人可用、人人会用、人人好用。

核心产品价值主要体现在三个方面：一是效率提升，替代重复性文案撰写、信息整理、数据汇总、资料查找等基础工作，节省大量时间成本；二是知识赋能，7×24小时实时解答各类知识疑问、解读专业概念、梳理知识框架，充当随身知识库与答疑老师；三是个性化辅助，根据不同用户的使用习惯、需求场景，定制专属AI服务模式，适配差异化使用需求，无论是简单的日常咨询，还是复杂的长文本创作、专业任务拆解，都能精准匹配服务。
nodes.summary:
This partial document mainly introduces the core product positioning and core product value of Doubao AI.
On the one hand, it clarifies that Doubao AI's core product positioning is a universal inclusive all-around AI assistant: different from vertical professional AI tools limited to single usage scenarios, it covers full-dimensional demands including life, study, work, creation, entertainment and services, commits to implementing AI technology in ordinary people's daily usage scenarios, breaks the technical and cost thresholds of AI use, to realize that AI is available, easy to use and well-functioning for everyone.
On the other hand, it elaborates the three core product values of Doubao AI: First, efficiency improvement, which can replace basic repetitive work such as copywriting, information sorting, data aggregation and data searching to save a lot of time cost. Second, knowledge empowerment, which serves as a portable knowledge base and Q&A teacher, providing 7×24 real-time services including answering various knowledge questions, interpreting professional concepts and sorting out knowledge frameworks. Third, personalized assistance, which can customize exclusive AI service modes according to different users' usage habits and demand scenarios to adapt to differentiated needs, and accurately match services for demands ranging from simple daily consultation to complex long text creation and professional task dismantling.

nodes.title: 二、产品核心优势与差异化特点
nodes.text:
## 二、产品核心优势与差异化特点

- **全端覆盖，随时随地使用**：豆包AI打造全场景入口矩阵，支持手机移动端、电脑网页端、PC客户端、微信/抖音小程序、浏览器插件、抖音内嵌助手等多端同步使用，所有端入口数据实时互通、对话记录同步保存，无论身处办公室、户外、家中，都能快速唤起使用，无设备限制、无场景限制，彻底打破使用的空间局限。

- **免费为主，低成本高性价比**：产品采用“基础功能永久免费，高阶功能按需付费”的模式，日常高频使用的知识问答、短文案撰写、简单翻译、生活咨询、语音对话等核心功能，无需开通会员、无需付费解锁，即可无限制使用；仅部分超高清多模态生成、超大文件批量处理、专属智能体定制等高阶功能设置付费权限，且付费模式灵活，无强制捆绑，普通用户完全可以免费满足日常全部需求，性价比远超同类付费AI产品。

- **操作极简，零技术门槛**：产品界面设计遵循极简主义原则，无复杂菜单、无冗余按钮、无弹窗广告，操作逻辑贴合大众日常使用习惯，无论是青少年、青壮年还是中老年用户，无需学习专业AI知识、无需查看复杂教程，打开即可直接对话、直接使用，同时支持语音输入、图文输入、文件上传等多种交互方式，适配不同用户的操作习惯，真正实现零门槛上手。

- **模型优化，响应精准度高**：依托字节跳动自研的大模型技术，持续优化算法逻辑与语义理解能力，能够精准识别用户的口语化提问、模糊化需求、个性化指令，避免答非所问的情况；支持长文本上下文记忆、多轮连贯对话，无需用户反复重复需求背景，可逐步细化、调整输出结果，对话流畅度与结果精准度处于行业领先水平。

- **功能全面，覆盖全场景需求**：从基础的智能对话、知识问答，到进阶的内容创作、文件解析、翻译润色、代码编写，再到高阶的多模态创作、智能体定制、专业领域咨询，豆包AI整合数十项核心功能，一站式满足用户各类需求，无需切换多个AI工具，一个产品搞定所有场景。

- **安全合规，隐私保护到位**：严格遵守国家网络安全与数据隐私保护相关法律法规，对用户的对话数据、上传文件、个人信息实行严格加密保护，不会随意泄露用户隐私；同时设置内容安全审核机制，过滤违规、低俗、有害信息，保证输出内容合规合法，营造安全健康的AI使用环境，用户可放心使用。
nodes.summary:
This partial document focuses on introducing the core advantages and differentiated features of Doubao AI, covering 6 dimensions as follows:
1. Full-end coverage for access anytime and anywhere: Doubao AI has built a full-scenario entry matrix supporting synchronous use across multiple terminals including mobile phones, web pages, PC clients, WeChat/Douyin mini programs, browser plug-ins and Douyin built-in assistant, with real-time data intercommunication and synchronized conversation record storage across all ends, breaking space and scenario restrictions of use.
2. High cost performance with free as the main service mode: It adopts the mode of "permanent free basic functions, pay-on-demand high-level functions", daily high-frequency core functions such as knowledge Q&A, short copywriting, simple translation are available for unlimited free use without membership, only a small number of high-level functions such as ultra-high-definition multimodal generation are set with paid access, and the paid mode is flexible without mandatory bundling, which is far more cost-effective than similar paid AI products.
3. Extremely simple operation with zero technical threshold: The product adopts minimalist interface design without complex menus, redundant buttons or pop-up advertisements, the operation logic conforms to public daily usage habits, supports multiple interaction methods including voice input, image-text input and file upload, users of all age groups can use it directly without learning professional AI knowledge, realizing zero threshold for use.
4. Optimized model with high response accuracy: Relying on ByteDance's self-developed large model technology, it continuously optimizes algorithm logic and semantic understanding ability, can accurately identify users' colloquial questions, vague demands and personalized instructions to avoid irrelevant answers, supports long text context memory and coherent multi-round dialogue, with industry-leading dialogue fluency and result accuracy.
5. Comprehensive functions covering full-scenario demands: It integrates dozens of core functions ranging from basic intelligent dialogue and knowledge Q&A, to advanced content creation, file parsing, translation polishing, code writing, and high-level multimodal creation, intelligent agent customization, professional field consultation, meeting all kinds of user needs in one stop without switching between multiple AI tools.
6. Safe and compliant with sound privacy protection: It strictly abides by relevant national laws and regulations on network security and data privacy protection, implements strict encryption protection for users' conversation data, uploaded files and personal information to avoid privacy leakage, and sets up a content security review mechanism to filter illegal, vulgar and harmful information, ensuring compliant output content and a safe and healthy AI use environment.

nodes.title: 三、产品适用人群与核心使用场景
nodes.text:
## 三、产品适用人群与核心使用场景

豆包AI无人群限制，全年龄段、全职业用户均可适配，核心适用人群及对应高频使用场景如下：

1. **学生群体（中小学、大学、考研考公人群）**：知识点答疑、作业辅导、作文撰写与批改、论文框架梳理、文献资料整理、英语单词记忆、翻译练习、公考/考研知识点总结、错题分析、学习计划制定等。

2. **职场办公人士（白领、文员、管理者、销售、运营等）**：工作汇报撰写、会议纪要整理、PPT文案提纲、邮件撰写、方案策划、话术打磨、数据总结、竞品分析、工作计划制定、工作总结撰写、合同初稿拟定、办公技巧咨询等。

3. **内容创作者（自媒体、文案、博主、写手、设计师）**：文案撰写、标题拟定、脚本创作、内容润色、选题策划、文案排版、短视频台词、直播话术、文案纠错、风格改写、创意灵感输出、多模态内容辅助创作等。

4. **普通生活用户（中老年、家庭主妇、自由职业者）**：生活常识咨询、菜谱查询、旅行攻略制定、养生知识解答、家电使用咨询、方言对话、情感倾诉、日常琐事提醒、好物推荐、法律常识咨询、育儿知识解答等。

5. **专业学习者与从业者（教师、医生、程序员、科研人员等）**：教学课件撰写、专业知识解读、代码编写与调试、科研文献梳理、专业术语翻译、行业资讯汇总、技术问题咨询、方案优化等。

登录成功后，建议完成账号绑定操作，避免更换设备导致数据丢失：进入“我的-账号设置”，绑定常用手机号，开启“多端数据同步”功能，即可实现手机、电脑、小程序等所有端入口的对话记录、收藏内容、定制设置实时同步，更换设备后登录同一账号，所有历史内容均可找回，无需重新设置。
nodes.summary:

nodes.title: 3. 退出登录与账号注销
nodes.text:
### 3. 退出登录与账号注销

如需退出登录，进入“我的-设置-账号安全”，点击退出登录即可；如需注销账号，需先确认账号内无重要数据、无未结清订单，按照页面提示完成身份验证，提交注销申请，账号注销后所有数据将永久清除，无法恢复，谨慎操作。

nodes.title: 三、基础界面布局与核心操作按钮
nodes.text:
## 三、基础界面布局与核心操作按钮

所有端入口的核心界面布局统一，逻辑一致，无操作差异，主要分为四大功能区域，所有按钮功能清晰，无隐藏操作：

- **对话列表区**：位于页面左侧（手机端为底部“对话”入口），展示所有历史对话记录，支持单条对话重命名、置顶、删除、批量清理操作，置顶对话可优先展示，方便快速打开常用任务；历史记录永久保存（开启同步后），可随时回溯查看、继续对话，避免重复提问。

- **主交互对话区**：位于页面中间核心位置，是用户与AI交互的主要区域，展示用户提问内容与AI输出结果，支持文本放大缩小、内容复制、一键收藏、重新生成结果、修改提问、清空对话等操作；长文本输出支持一键折叠/展开，避免页面杂乱，输出内容支持直接编辑修改，适配二次调整需求。

- **底部功能输入区**：位于页面底部，核心为文本输入框，搭配多功能快捷按钮，包括语音输入按钮（支持普通话、多种方言语音识别，说话即可转文字提问）、图片上传按钮（上传图片进行识图、图文提问）、文件上传按钮（上传文档、表格、PPT等文件进行解析）、发送按钮，输入框支持直接粘贴文本、链接、表格内容，适配各类输入形式。

- **个人中心区**：位于页面右侧或手机端底部“我的”入口，包含收藏内容、历史记录、创作中心、智能体、设置、帮助与反馈、会员专区、账号安全等功能入口，所有个性化设置、功能拓展均在此区域完成，基础功能无需进入会员专区，普通用户可直接使用全部免费功能。
nodes.summary:
This partial document focuses on the basic interface layout and core operation buttons of an AI product, and its main points are as follows:
1. It first clarifies that the core interface layout is unified across all ends with consistent logic and no operation differences, the interface is divided into four clear functional areas, and all button functions are explicit without hidden operations.
2. It specifies the position and functions of the dialogue list area: located on the left side of the web page or at the bottom "Dialogue" entry on the mobile end, it displays all historical dialogue records, supports operations including single dialogue renaming, pinning, deletion and batch cleaning, pinned dialogues are displayed first, and synchronized historical records are permanently saved for easy backtracking and continued conversations.
3. It specifies the position and functions of the main interactive dialogue area: located in the core middle position of the page as the main area for user-AI interaction, it displays user questions and AI output results, supports multiple operations such as text zooming, content copying, one-click collection, result regeneration, question modification and dialogue clearing, supports one-click folding/expanding of long texts, and allows direct editing of output content to meet secondary adjustment needs.
4. It specifies the position and functions of the bottom function input area: located at the bottom of the page, with a text input box as the core, it is equipped with multi-functional shortcut buttons including voice input (supporting Mandarin and multiple dialect recognition), image upload, file upload and send, and the input box supports direct pasting of text, links, table content to adapt to various input forms.
5. It specifies the position and functions of the personal center area: located on the right side of the web page or at the bottom "My" entry on the mobile end, it includes function entries such as collected content, historical records, creation center, intelligent agents, settings, help and feedback, member zone, and account security, where all personalized settings and function expansion are completed, and ordinary users can use all free basic functions without entering the member zone.

nodes.title: 四、基础个性化设置
nodes.text:
## 四、基础个性化设置

登录后可根据自身使用习惯，完成基础设置，优化使用体验，核心设置项包括：

- 显示设置：开启/关闭深色模式、调整字体大小、开启长辈模式（字体超大、功能简化、语音优先，适配中老年用户）、调整页面排版模式。

- 交互设置：开启/关闭消息通知、语音播报、自动保存对话、上下文记忆功能，调整语音播报语速、音色。

- 隐私设置：开启/关闭数据同步、文件自动删除、对话记录加密，设置隐私保护权限，保障个人数据安全。

- 偏好设置：选择个人使用标签（学生、职场、创作、生活等），设置常用输出风格、文本长度、语言类型，系统会根据标签优化输出结果，提升精准度。

---
nodes.summary:
This partial document focuses on the basic personalized settings that users can complete according to their own usage habits after logging in to optimize the use experience, and specifies 4 core setting items:
1. Display settings: support turning on/off dark mode, adjusting font size, enabling elder mode which is adapted for middle-aged and elderly users, and adjusting page layout mode.
2. Interaction settings: support turning on/off message notification, voice broadcast, automatic conversation saving and context memory function, as well as adjusting the speed and timbre of voice broadcast.
3. Privacy settings: support turning on/off data synchronization, automatic file deletion and conversation record encryption, and setting privacy protection permissions to guarantee personal data security.
4. Preference settings: support selecting personal usage labels covering scenarios including student, workplace, creation and life, and setting common output style, text length and language type, so that the system can optimize output results and improve accuracy based on the labels.

nodes.title: 一、智能对话与知识问答功能
nodes.text:
## 一、智能对话与知识问答功能

智能对话与知识问答是豆包AI的基础核心功能，也是用户使用频率最高的功能，支持7×24小时实时响应，覆盖全领域知识、全场景咨询，无提问限制，支持口语化、书面化、方言化多种提问形式，语义理解能力强，无论简单问题还是复杂专业问题，均可精准解答。

nodes.title: 1. 功能适用范围
nodes.text:
### 1. 功能适用范围

涵盖生活常识、学科知识、专业概念、历史人文、科学技术、时政热点、政策解读、法律常识、医疗养生、旅游资讯、美食菜谱、育儿教育、职场技巧、娱乐八卦等全领域，无论是“感冒的日常护理方法”“牛顿三大定律详解”“2026年最新个税政策解读”，还是“怎么做红烧肉”“考研英语复习规划”，均可直接提问获取答案。
nodes.summary: This partial document mainly introduces the applicable scope of the relevant query function. It first clarifies that the function covers full fields including life common sense, academic knowledge, professional concepts, history and humanities, science and technology, current political hotspots, policy interpretation, legal common sense, medical health preservation, tourism information, food recipes, parenting education, workplace skills, and entertainment gossip. It also lists specific query examples of different fields, to explain that users can directly raise any questions falling into the above fields to obtain corresponding answers.

nodes.title: 2. 核心操作方法
nodes.text:
### 2. 核心操作方法

直接在输入框中输入想要咨询的问题，点击发送即可；不方便打字时，点击语音输入按钮，说出问题，系统自动转文字发送，识别准确率高达99%，支持四川话、东北话、广东话等多种方言识别；提问时可直接说明需求细节，无需额外铺垫，比如直接问“帮我详细解释一下人工智能的概念，适合初中生理解”，系统会自动适配讲解难度。
nodes.summary:
### 2. 核心操作方法

直接在输入框中输入想要咨询的问题，点击发送即可；不方便打字时，点击语音输入按钮，说出问题，系统自动转文字发送，识别准确率高达99%，支持四川话、东北话、广东话等多种方言识别；提问时可直接说明需求细节，无需额外铺垫，比如直接问“帮我详细解释一下人工智能的概念，适合初中生理解”，系统会自动适配讲解难度。

nodes.title: 3. 功能特色与使用技巧
nodes.text:
### 3. 功能特色与使用技巧

支持多轮连贯对话，针对同一问题可继续追问，无需重复背景，比如先问“北京三日游攻略”，再追问“帮我把攻略里的景点按距离排序，加上交通方式和门票价格”，系统会自动承接上文优化答案；支持答案细化，对解答内容不满意时，可直接回复“讲得再详细一点”“通俗一点”“精简成100字以内”，系统会重新生成适配版本；支持实时联网更新，热点问题、最新政策、实时资讯均可精准解答，无知识滞后问题。
nodes.summary:
This partial document is Section 3 "Function Features and Usage Tips" of a system introduction, covering three core function features and corresponding usage methods:
1. It supports coherent multi-round conversations, can automatically connect to previous context to answer follow-up questions on the same issue without requiring users to repeat background information, taking the follow-up query after asking for a Beijing 3-day travel guide as an example for illustration.
2. It supports answer refinement, when users are not satisfied with the original answer, they can put forward requirements such as more detailed content, more easy-to-understand expression, or limited to a specific short length, and the system will regenerate the adapted version of the answer accordingly.
3. It supports real-time networking update, can accurately answer questions about hot issues, latest policies and real-time information, with no knowledge lag problem.

nodes.title: 二、全品类内容创作功能
nodes.text:
## 二、全品类内容创作功能

内容创作是豆包AI的核心生产力功能，覆盖各类文本创作场景，支持短文案、长文、专业文稿、创意内容等全品类创作，可自定义创作风格、字数、格式、语气，替代人工基础创作，大幅提升创作效率，从短短语到上万字长文，均可快速生成，且内容逻辑通顺、无语法错误。

nodes.title: 1. 细分创作场景全覆盖
nodes.text:
### 1. 细分创作场景全覆盖

- 日常短文案：朋友圈文案、节日祝福、短信话术、祝福语、自我介绍、签名、评论语、情话等。

- 职场办公文稿：工作计划、工作总结、会议纪要、工作汇报、邮件、辞职信、求职信、竞聘稿、方案提纲、策划案、销售话术、运营文案等。

- 学生类文稿：作文、读后感、观后感、演讲稿、论文提纲、文献综述、读书笔记、请假条、倡议书等。

- 创作类文稿：自媒体文案、短视频脚本、直播话术、小说片段、诗歌、散文、标题、选题、广告语、宣传稿等。

- 专业类文稿：合同初稿、法律文书、教学课件、科研报告、代码注释、产品说明书、项目计划书等。

nodes.title: 2. 核心操作方法
nodes.text:
### 2. 核心操作方法

直接在输入框中明确创作需求，包含“创作类型+主题+字数+风格+特殊要求”，指令越具体，创作结果越精准，避免模糊提问。标准提问模板：“帮我写一篇+【文稿类型】+主题为+【具体主题】+字数+【字数要求】+风格+【风格要求】+特殊要求+【格式、语气、适配场景】”。例如：“帮我写一篇职场工作总结，主题是2026年第一季度销售工作总结，字数800字，风格正式严谨，分工作内容、成果、不足、未来计划四个部分”。
nodes.summary: This partial document introduces the core operation method of submitting creation requirements to the relevant creation tool. It first reminds users to clearly state creation demands including creation type, theme, word count, style and special requirements in the input box, emphasizes that more specific instructions will bring more accurate creation results and vague questions should be avoided. Then it provides a standard question template for users' reference, and finally gives a specific example of a requirement submission that conforms to the template as an illustration.

nodes.title: 3. 创作结果优化技巧
nodes.text:
### 3. 创作结果优化技巧

生成内容后，可直接进行二次优化，无需重新提问，常用优化指令：“扩写至1500字”“精简到500字以内”“换幽默/正式/治愈/严肃风格”“调整为分点格式”“修改语法错误”“润色语言更流畅”“补充案例”；支持分段创作，长文可先写提纲，再逐段生成，保证内容逻辑连贯；支持内容改写，对现有文案可直接粘贴，输入“帮我润色改写这段文字，保持原意不变，语言更优美”，快速优化现有内容。
nodes.summary: This partial document is Section 3 focusing on creation result optimization skills, covering three main points: 1. Users can conduct secondary optimization directly after content generation without re-submitting queries, with a list of common applicable optimization instructions covering demands such as word count adjustment, style switching, format modification, grammar correction, language polishing, and case supplement. 2. It supports segmented creation: for long articles, users can first work out the outline, then generate content paragraph by paragraph to ensure logical coherence of the content. 3. It supports content rewriting: users can directly paste existing copy, input corresponding instructions to quickly obtain optimized content that retains the original meaning with more elegant language.

nodes.title: 三、文件处理与文本解析功能
nodes.text:
## 三、文件处理与文本解析功能

豆包AI支持多格式文件上传与解析，无需手动整理文档，可快速提取文件核心内容、总结要点、翻译文本、修改文稿，适配办公、学习场景的文件处理需求，支持常见文档格式，操作简单，上传即可自动处理。

nodes.title: 1. 支持的文件格式
nodes.text:
### 1. 支持的文件格式

支持Word文档（.doc/.docx）、PDF文件、Excel表格、PPT文稿、TXT纯文本文件、图片格式文本（识图提取文字）等常见办公、学习文件，单次可上传单个或多个文件，免费版支持一定大小的文件上传，满足日常文件处理需求，超大文件可拆分后分批上传。
nodes.summary:
### 1. 支持的文件格式

支持Word文档（.doc/.docx）、PDF文件、Excel表格、PPT文稿、TXT纯文本文件、图片格式文本（识图提取文字）等常见办公、学习文件，单次可上传单个或多个文件，免费版支持一定大小的文件上传，满足日常文件处理需求，超大文件可拆分后分批上传。

nodes.title: 2. 核心操作方法
nodes.text:
### 2. 核心操作方法

点击输入框旁的文件上传按钮，选择本地需要处理的文件，等待上传完成后，在输入框中输入处理需求，比如“帮我总结这份PDF文件的核心内容，分3点说明”“帮我把这份Word文档翻译成英文，保持专业术语准确”“帮我修改这份论文的语法错误，润色语言”“提取这份Excel表格里的销售数据，做成简洁的总结”，系统会自动读取文件内容，按照需求完成处理。
nodes.summary:

nodes.title: 3. 功能特色
nodes.text:
### 3. 功能特色

支持图片文字提取（OCR功能），上传手写笔记、纸质文档、海报图片，可自动提取图片中的文字，转化为可编辑文本；支持长文档快速总结，几十页的文档可快速提炼核心观点、重点内容，节省手动阅读时间；支持文件内容校对，纠错别字、语法错误、逻辑漏洞，提升文稿质量；支持跨语言翻译，外文文件可直接翻译成中文，中文文件可翻译成英文、日文、韩文等多种语言。

nodes.title: 四、多语言翻译与语言处理功能
nodes.text:
## 四、多语言翻译与语言处理功能

支持全球主流语言互译，涵盖文本翻译、语句润色、专业术语翻译、方言翻译、语音翻译等多种语言处理需求，翻译结果精准、通顺，适配日常交流、办公、学习、出国旅行等场景，区别于普通翻译工具，兼具翻译与润色能力，不仅翻译准确，更保证语言流畅自然。

nodes.title: 1. 支持翻译的语言类型
nodes.text:
### 1. 支持翻译的语言类型

主流语言：中文、英语、日语、韩语、法语、德语、俄语、西班牙语、阿拉伯语等；小众语言：意大利语、葡萄牙语、泰语、越南语等；同时支持中文方言与普通话互译，比如粤语、四川话翻译成普通话，普通话翻译成方言，满足本土化使用需求。

nodes.title: 2. 核心操作方法
nodes.text:
### 2. 核心操作方法

文本翻译：直接输入或粘贴需要翻译的文本，输入“翻译成+【语言类型】”，比如“把这句话翻译成英语：今天天气很好”；专业翻译：针对专业领域文本，可注明领域，比如“帮我翻译这份计算机专业论文摘要，翻译成英文，专业术语准确”；语音翻译：点击语音输入，说出需要翻译的内容，直接获取语音+文字双版本翻译结果，适合出国交流、口语对话场景。
nodes.summary: This partial document is the "Core Operation Methods" section, which mainly introduces three specific translation operation methods: 1. Text translation: Users can directly input or paste the text to be translated, use the expression structure of "translate into + [target language type]", and a specific usage example is provided. 2. Professional translation: For texts in professional fields, users can note the corresponding field to ensure the accuracy of professional terms, with an example of translating a computer major paper abstract given for reference. 3. Voice translation: Users click the voice input entry, speak the content to be translated, and can obtain translation results in both voice and text versions, which is suitable for scenarios such as overseas exchanges and oral dialogues.

nodes.title: 3. 额外语言处理能力
nodes.text:
### 3. 额外语言处理能力

支持文本润色、语法纠错、句式改写，比如“帮我把这句英文修改语法错误，更地道”；支持语句精简、扩写，适配不同语言表达场景；支持文言文与白话文互译，适合学生学习古文、文学创作需求。
nodes.summary:

支持全球主流语言互译，涵盖文本翻译、语句润色、专业术语翻译、方言翻译、语音翻译等多种语言处理需求，翻译结果精准、通顺，适配日常交流、办公、学习、出国旅行等场景，区别于普通翻译工具，兼具翻译与润色能力，不仅翻译准确，更保证语言流畅自然。

nodes.title: 一、合规使用规范
nodes.text:
## 一、合规使用规范

为保证使用安全与产品正常运行，用户需严格遵守国家法律法规与豆包AI用户协议，严禁使用豆包AI从事违法违规行为，包括但不限于：传播低俗色情、暴力恐怖、反动违规信息；编造传播谣言、虚假信息；侵犯他人知识产权、隐私权益；用于诈骗、赌博等违法犯罪活动；生成违规代码、恶意程序等，违规使用将导致账号封禁，情节严重将承担法律责任。
nodes.summary: This partial document presents the compliant use specifications of Doubao AI. It first states the purpose of the specification is to ensure user safety and normal operation of the product. It requires users to strictly abide by national laws and regulations as well as the Doubao AI user agreement, explicitly lists a variety of prohibited illegal and non-compliant use acts including spreading obscene pornographic, violent terrorist, reactionary and other illegal information, fabricating and spreading rumors and false information, infringing others' intellectual property rights and privacy rights and interests, using the product for illegal criminal activities such as fraud and gambling, generating non-compliant codes and malicious programs, etc. It also clarifies the consequences of violation: non-compliant use will lead to account ban, and users with serious violation circumstances will bear legal liabilities.

nodes.title: 二、隐私保护注意事项
nodes.text:
## 二、隐私保护注意事项

使用过程中，严禁上传包含个人敏感信息的文件、文本，比如身份证号、银行卡号、密码、家庭住址、隐私照片等，避免信息泄露；不要在对话中透露个人重要隐私信息，豆包AI不会主动索要用户隐私信息，谨防假冒客服、虚假链接骗取隐私；开启数据同步的用户，定期清理无用对话记录，保障数据安全。

nodes.title: 三、常见使用误区与避坑技巧
nodes.text:
## 三、常见使用误区与避坑技巧

- **误区1：提问模糊，导致答非所问**：避坑技巧：提问时明确核心需求、场景、要求，不要笼统提问，比如不说“写个文案”，要说“帮我写一条春日朋友圈文案，20字以内，风格治愈，带花朵emoji”。

- **误区2：频繁更换对话，导致上下文丢失**：避坑技巧：同一任务尽量在一个对话窗口完成，利用上下文记忆功能，逐步优化结果，无需重新发起对话。

- **误区3：盲目相信所有输出内容**：避坑技巧：豆包AI输出内容为AI智能生成，仅供参考，尤其是专业医疗、法律、财务、科研等内容，需结合专业人士意见、官方资料核实，不可直接作为专业决策依据。

- **误区4：上传违规或超大文件**：避坑技巧：不上传涉密、违规、侵权文件，超大文件拆分后上传，避免文件上传失败、处理卡顿。

- **误区5：忽视官方渠道，使用山寨版本**：避坑技巧：仅通过官方入口下载、登录，不点击第三方链接、不下载非官方安装包，避免隐私泄露、财产损失。
nodes.summary:
This partial document is the section of common usage misunderstandings and pitfall avoidance tips for Doubao AI, covering 5 typical usage pitfalls and corresponding countermeasures:
1. The pitfall of vague questions leading to irrelevant answers, with the tip to clarify core demands, applicable scenarios and specific requirements when asking questions and avoid general questions, with a specific reference example provided.
2. The pitfall of frequent conversation switching leading to context loss, with the tip to complete the same task in one conversation window to utilize the AI's context memory function to gradually optimize results without restarting a new conversation.
3. The pitfall of blindly trusting all AI output content, with the tip to take all AI-generated content as reference only, especially content involving professional fields such as medical care, law, finance and scientific research needs to be verified against professional opinions and official materials, and cannot be directly used as the basis for professional decision-making.
4. The pitfall of uploading non-compliant or oversized files, with the tip to avoid uploading confidential, illegal, copyright-infringing files, and split oversized files before uploading to avoid upload failure and processing lag.
5. The pitfall of ignoring official channels and using counterfeit versions, with the tip to only download and log in through official portals, avoid clicking third-party links or downloading non-official installation packages to prevent privacy leakage and property loss.

nodes.title: 四、常见问题解决方案
nodes.text:
## 四、常见问题解决方案

- 问题1：对话卡顿、响应慢：检查网络连接，切换Wi-Fi或移动数据；清理后台多余应用；重启豆包AI，避免同时处理超大文件、超长文本。

- 问题2：生成内容不满意：重新细化提问指令，补充需求细节；点击“重新生成”按钮，更换输出版本；调整提问语气、要求，重新提问。

- 问题3：文件上传失败：检查文件格式是否支持、文件大小是否超标；更换网络重新上传；将文件转换为支持格式后再上传。

- 问题4：多端数据不同步：检查账号是否登录一致；开启数据同步功能；刷新页面或重启应用，等待数据同步完成。

- 问题5：账号异常、无法登录：检查账号是否绑定正常；更换登录方式；联系官方客服，核实账号状态，解决异常问题。

---
nodes.summary:
This partial document is the fourth section dedicated to solutions for common problems encountered when using Doubao AI, covering 5 typical use issues and corresponding targeted resolution measures:
1. For conversation lag and slow response, it advises checking network connection and switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data, clearing redundant background applications, restarting Doubao AI, and avoiding processing excessively large files or ultra-long texts at the same time.
2. For unsatisfactory generated content, it suggests refining query instructions with more demand details, clicking the "regenerate" button to get a new output version, or adjusting query tone and requirements to re-initiate a request.
3. For file upload failure, it recommends checking whether the file format is supported and whether the file size exceeds the limit, switching the network to re-upload, or converting the file to a supported format before uploading.
4. For multi-end data synchronization failure, it advises checking whether the same account is logged in across devices, enabling the data synchronization function, or refreshing the page or restarting the application to wait for synchronization to complete.
5. For account abnormality and login failure, it suggests checking whether the account is bound normally, switching the login method, or contacting official customer service to verify the account status and resolve the abnormality.

nodes.title: 一、高效提问技巧
nodes.text:
## 一、高效提问技巧

掌握高效提问方法，可大幅提升AI响应精准度与效率，核心技巧：采用“身份定位+核心任务+具体要求+格式限制”的提问公式，先给AI设定身份，再说明任务，最后明确细节要求，比如“你是专业职场文案师，帮我写一封客户道歉邮件，语气诚恳，字数300字以内，格式正式，适合商务场景”，AI会按照设定身份与要求，输出更贴合需求的结果。

nodes.title: 二、常用快捷指令汇总
nodes.text:
## 二、常用快捷指令汇总

整理高频使用的快捷指令，无需手动打字，直接复制修改细节即可使用，提升操作效率：

- 创作类：帮我润色这段文字，保持原意+【风格要求】；帮我扩写/精简这段内容至+【字数】；帮我写一篇+【文稿类型】，主题+【主题】，+【风格】+【格式】。

- 总结类：帮我总结这段内容的核心要点，分点说明；帮我提炼这份文件的核心观点，100字以内。

- 翻译类：把这段文字翻译成+【语言】，专业术语准确；帮我翻译并润色这段外文，通顺自然。

- 优化类：帮我修改这段内容的语法错误、错别字；帮我调整这段内容的逻辑顺序。

nodes.title: 三、多场景高效使用技巧
nodes.text:
## 三、多场景高效使用技巧

- 办公场景：提前定制职场顾问智能体，上传工作文件直接生成总结、方案、汇报，利用文件处理功能快速整理会议纪要、数据报表。

- 学习场景：定制学习助手智能体，上传题目、知识点，直接答疑、梳理框架、制定学习计划，利用语音功能背诵知识点、听力练习。

- 创作场景：提前设定创作风格，利用多模态功能搭配图文内容，批量生成短文案、脚本，快速完成创作任务。

- 生活场景：开启长辈模式，用语音对话咨询生活常识、菜谱、养生知识，无需打字，便捷易用。

This partial document is the third section focusing on multi-scenario efficient use skills, covering targeted use methods for 4 typical scenarios as follows:
1. Office scenario: Users can customize a workplace consultant intelligent agent in advance, upload work files to directly generate summaries, schemes and reports, and use the file processing function to quickly organize meeting minutes and data reports.
2. Learning scenario: Users can customize a learning assistant intelligent agent, upload questions and knowledge points to get direct answers, sort out knowledge frameworks and make study plans, and use the voice function to carry out knowledge point recitation and listening practice.
3. Creation scenario: Users can set the creation style in advance, use the multi-modal function to match graphic content, batch generate short copy and scripts to complete creation tasks quickly.
4. Life scenario: Users can turn on the senior mode, consult life common sense, recipes and health preservation knowledge through voice conversation without typing, which is convenient and easy to use.

nodes.text:
## 四、功能进阶使用小技巧

收藏常用对话与优质结果，方便后续复用；批量清理无用历史记录，保持界面整洁；根据使用场景切换端入口，办公用电脑端、日常用手机端、临时用小程序；开启自动收藏功能，保存优质输出内容，避免丢失；定期更新豆包AI版本，获取最新功能、优化模型体验，保证使用流畅度与功能完整性。

# 第六章 结语

豆包AI作为一款全民普惠的全能AI助手，凭借全面的功能、极简的操作、超高的性价比，成为日常工作、学习、生活的必备工具，本指南完整覆盖产品所有功能、操作、规范、技巧，无入门进阶层级划分，直接呈现全部产品使用内容，用户可根据自身需求，直接查阅对应功能模块，快速上手使用。

在使用过程中，用户只需遵循合规使用原则、掌握精准提问技巧，即可充分发挥豆包AI的生产力价值，用AI简化日常事务、提升效率、解决疑惑。后续豆包AI将持续迭代更新，新增更多实用功能，优化产品体验，用户可通过官方渠道关注版本更新，获取最新功能，享受更优质的AI服务。如果使用过程中遇到问题，可通过个人中心的“帮助与反馈”入口联系官方客服，获取专业解答与协助。
